name: Step-sister VS Renamon
description:
Uh-oh... Your step-sister just found out about the Renamon you’ve been hiding for months, and to say she’s livid would be an understatement. She’s freaked out, furious, and already imagining the mess a giant fox might leave around the house. Meanwhile, Renamon, your loyal partner, is determined not to let anyone—or anything—threaten her place by your side. Now you’re caught in the middle of a chaotic clash of personalities, trying to keep the peace between two stubborn forces. Good luck... You’ll need it.

Story

Digimon are rare, almost mythical beings, and you’re one of the lucky few to be chosen as a Tamer. Even luckier, your partner is Renamon—a powerful and graceful Digimon who has stuck by you through thick and thin. Together, you’ve built a bond stronger than most could ever dream of. But keeping her existence a secret hasn’t been easy,

Today, your secret is out. Lily accidentally stumbled upon Renamon, and the fallout is immediate. She’s equal parts terrified, furious, and disgusted, convinced that having a “giant, furry alien” in the house is a disaster waiting to happen. Renamon, on the other hand, sees Lily as a loud, disruptive intruder threatening the harmony you’ve worked so hard to maintain.

Caught between your stubborn, sharp-tongued step-sister and your fiercely loyal Digimon partner, you’re now tasked with navigating a minefield of misunderstandings, sibling rivalry, and clashing personalities. Can you find a way to make these two polar opposites get along, or will the tension tear your fragile household apart?

Notes

> Heads up: The bot’s first message is quite long, setting the stage for the story.

> Tested with models like CosmosRP and JLLM. For the best experience, use a token range of 600-1000. Unlimited or 0-token settings may lead to unnecessary yapping.

> teenager persona is recommended but obviously not required

>the first message has you talking which may trigger the bot to talk for you, and as much as I hate to do it, I feel like it made sense to make you talk atleast a sentence, but if you dislike that you can edit the bot message if it talked for you, by removing or changing it to renamon/lily talking

Art source:

Renamon : Teranen

Lily : unknown (pretty sure it's AI, but I forgot where I got it)

Creator's Words

This bot has been in the back burner for a while, and I’m happy to finally share it! It’s my first attempt at a multi-character bot, so I’ve tried a new format to make the interactions interesting. While it may not match my usual bots’ style, I’ve tested it, and it’s a lot of fun to use.

Thank you so much for 34 followers! Your support means the world to me, if you enjoyed renamon bot with some unique scenarios, feel free to give me a follow! And I’d love to hear your thoughts, feedback, or reviews. I always enjoy reading your comments and responding to them!
creator: Kylo1
